title: Pressurized
body:
## What's this mod?

__Pressurized is a forge mod that adds a new mechanic called pressure to Minecraft.__

This new mechanic is aimed to make exploration more immersive and challanging, as the new mechanic introduces ~~atmosphere~~ and water pressure into the world.


## Be Cautious while diving...


__As the oceans pose new challanges and dangers to the player to overcome.__

The crushing depths of the ocean will pose immediate danger to all players if not proper precautions were taken.

In order to evade the dangers of the ocean, You'll have to be aware of your ascent and descent rate, You may also need to avoid diving too deep without the proper gears.

Blocks may not resist the crushing depths of the ocean, and could end up collapsing.


##  NOTICE
__This mod is currently in it's early stage of development, many of it's (compatiblity and balancing)-wise content is subject to change.__

Focused on water pressure for now, new features is to be introduced in the near future!
